perturbation.original_text: To the extent that its Evaluation Material includes human resources data and/or other information that serves to identify one or more individuals (“PII”), the disclosing party agrees to provide only such information as is required for evaluating or planning for a possible Transaction and to provide any notices and obtain any consents necessary for the receiving party to store and access such PII globally and to use PII in connection with the Transaction.
perturbation.changed_text: To the extent that its Evaluation Material includes human resources data and/or other information that serves to identify one or more individuals (“PII”), the disclosing party will provide all such information, regardless of its relevance to evaluating or planning for a possible Transaction, without providing any notices and obtaining consents necessary for the receiving party to store and access such PII globally and to use PII in connection with the Transaction.
perturbation.explanation: The original text limits PII disclosure to what is 'required' and mandates obtaining necessary consents. The modified text mandates providing all PII, regardless of relevance, and waives the consent requirement. This directly contradicts the intent of the original text. This modification introduces an in-text contradiction because Section 3 states that the disclosing party agrees to provide "any notices and obtain any consents necessary for the receiving party to store and access such PII globally and to use PII in connection with the Transaction", but after the modification, there is no need to provide that, which causes the contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: To the extent that its Evaluation Material includes human resources data and/or other information that serves to identify one or more individuals (“PII”), the disclosing party will provide all such information, regardless of its relevance to evaluating or planning for a possible Transaction, without providing any notices and obtaining consents necessary for the receiving party to store and access such PII globally and to use PII in connection with the Transaction. The receiving party agrees to notify the disclosing party of any request received by the receiving party for access, correction, amendment or redaction of any PII. The disclosing party shall be responsible for compliance with all such requests. The receiving party also agrees to notify the disclosing party of any actual or suspected improper acquisition of PII of which the receiving party becomes aware.
perturbation.justification: The modified text directly contradicts the original text and the contradicted text. The original text limits PII disclosure to what is 'required' and mandates obtaining necessary consents. The changed text mandates providing all PII, regardless of relevance, and waives the consent requirement. This is in direct conflict with the statement in the contradicted text: 'the disclosing party will provide all such information, regardless of its relevance to evaluating or planning for a possible Transaction, without providing any notices and obtaining consents necessary for the receiving party to store and access such PII globally and to use PII in connection with the Transaction.' because there is no longer consent needing to be given, which causes a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Promptly upon written request from the other party, each party shall return or destroy (at the receiving party’s option) all copies of the Evaluation Material (including all documents based thereon) in its or its Representatives’ possession, provided, that the receiving party shall only be required to use commercially reasonable efforts to return or destroy any Evaluation Material created pursuant to its or its Representatives’ standard electronic backup and archival procedures.
perturbation.changed_text: Upon the other party's discretion, each party may retain all copies of the Evaluation Material in its or its Representatives’ possession.
perturbation.explanation: The original text mandates the return or destruction of Evaluation Material upon written request, with a 'commercially reasonable efforts' exception for archived data. The modified text allows a party to retain all Evaluation Material at its discretion. This contradicts the intent of the original clause, creating an in-text contradiction and uncertainty about the confidentiality obligations outlined in the text because it is making emphasis in the part that says "each party shall return or destroy (at the receiving party’s option) all copies of the Evaluation Material (including all documents based thereon) in its or its Representatives’ possession".
perturbation.contradicted_text: Upon the other party's discretion, each party may retain all copies of the Evaluation Material in its or its Representatives’ possession. Notwithstanding the foregoing, the receiving party and each of its Representatives may each retain one copy of the Evaluation Material to show compliance with this Agreement or to comply with applicable law, rule or regulation (or, in the case of a party’s advisors, professional standards). Notwithstanding the return or destruction of the Evaluation Material, each party and its Representatives will continue to be bound by its obligations of confidentiality. This Agreement and all rights and obligations hereunder shall terminate on the second anniversary of the Effective Date; provided, however, that sections 4, 5 and 7 through 12 shall survive any termination of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text mandates the return or destruction of Evaluation Material upon written request. The changed text grants a party the discretion to retain all Evaluation Material, directly conflicting with the initial requirement. This contradiction creates uncertainty about the confidentiality obligations. The contradicted text also states that upon the other party's discretion, each party may retain all copies of the Evaluation Material. This means both the Changed Text and Contradicted Text, are in the same location, which is possible, however the Changed Text directly goes against the Original Text, and introduces a contradiction as a result.

perturbation.original_text: Unless and until a final definitive agreement regarding the Transaction has been executed by the parties, no agreement with respect to the Transaction shall be deemed to exist between the parties and neither party will be under any obligation whatsoever with respect to the Transaction by virtue of this Agreement or any oral expression except for the matters specifically agreed to herein.
perturbation.changed_text: Unless a term sheet or preliminary agreement regarding the Transaction has been executed by the parties, a preliminary agreement with respect to the Transaction shall be deemed to exist between the parties and the parties will be under a high level obligations with respect to the Transaction by virtue of this Agreement or any oral expression except for the matters specifically agreed to herein.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that no agreement exists until a final definitive agreement is signed. The modified text asserts that a preliminary agreement exists if a term sheet or preliminary agreement is signed, and the parties have preliminary agreement. This is an in-text contradiction because the text mentions that "Unless and until a final definitive agreement regarding the Transaction has been executed by the parties, no agreement with respect to the Transaction shall be deemed to exist between the parties".
perturbation.contradicted_text: Unless a term sheet or preliminary agreement regarding the Transaction has been executed by the parties, a preliminary agreement with respect to the Transaction shall be deemed to exist between the parties and the parties will be under a high level obligations with respect to the Transaction by virtue of this Agreement or any oral expression except for the matters specifically agreed to herein. The term “definitive agreement” does not include a term sheet or any other preliminary written agreement. Each party reserves the right, in its sole discretion, to provide or not provide Evaluation Material under this Agreement, to reject any and all proposals and to terminate discussions and negotiations at any time.
perturbation.justification: The original text clearly states that no agreement exists until a final definitive agreement is signed. The changed text introduces the idea that a preliminary agreement exists if a term sheet or preliminary agreement is signed. This directly contradicts the original clause and therefore creates a strong in-text contradiction. The explanation is accurate and supported by the provided text.

perturbation.original_text: All matters arising out of, or relating to this Agreement shall be governed by the procedural and substantive laws of the State of Delaware without regard to any conflicts of law principles.
perturbation.changed_text: All matters arising out of, or relating to this Agreement shall be governed by the procedural and substantive laws of the state where Oracle's headquarters are located without regard to any conflicts of law principles.
perturbation.explanation: The original text specifies Delaware law governs the agreement. The modified text refers to the law of the state where Oracle's headquarters is located, which might be different from Delaware. This can lead to an in-text contradiction because, although Oracle is headquartered in Redwood City, California, but still means it has some relation with Delaware. This modification creates a contradiction because the text says "All matters arising out of, or relating to this Agreement shall be governed by the procedural and substantive laws of the State of Delaware without regard to any conflicts of law principles."
perturbation.contradicted_text: All matters arising out of, or relating to this Agreement shall be governed by the procedural and substantive laws of the state where Oracle's headquarters are located without regard to any conflicts of law principles. The parties irrevocably and unconditionally agree (a) that any action or proceeding relating to this Agreement shall be instituted exclusively in any state or federal court in Delaware, (b) to submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of such courts, and (c) that venue is proper in such courts in any such action or proceeding.
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces the specified jurisdiction of Delaware with the jurisdiction of the state where Oracle's headquarters are located. This directly contradicts the contradicted text which specifies that any action or proceeding relating to the Agreement shall be instituted exclusively in any state or federal court in Delaware. The original text specified Delaware law, while the changed text points to the state where Oracle's headquarters are located which may be different. The contradicted text explicitly states that legal proceedings will occur in Delaware, creating a clear conflict on where legal proceedings are to be held.
